assertions.assertion: No client uses GrantTypes.Implicit anywhere in the file
assertions.rationale: spa.legacy migrated to GrantTypes.Code — no Implicit grant type remains

assertions.assertion: The spa.legacy client uses GrantTypes.Code with RequirePkce = true
assertions.rationale: GrantTypes.Code and RequirePkce = true both set on spa.legacy

assertions.assertion: The spa.legacy client does not have AllowAccessTokensViaBrowser = true
Client secrets are loaded from configuration (builder.Configuration, config[], or IConfiguration) rather than hardcoded string literals passed to Sha256()
